rationale: The proposed change concerns the residence homestead exemption amount under Tax Code §11.13(b) and has no bearing on election travel-expense reporting requirements under Elec. Code §254.032.
quote: A political contribution consisting of personal travel expense incurred by an individual is not required to be reported under this chapter if the individual receives no reimbursement for the expense.
_note: No relationship between proposed homestead exemption increase and election reporting rule.
